task_description: Implement mandatory permissions auth strategy: Calendar, Tasks, Slides are required at sign-in; Gmail becomes optional/incremental; update UI and backend accordingly.

verification.summary: pnpm lint passes with no errors. pnpm test: 2 pre-existing failures (ChatExperience/Sidebar) unrelated to this change. python3 -m py_compile passes on integrations.py, user_context.py, and main.py.
